description_long: This object is a compact semi-automatic handgun with a matte dark gray metal slide and a black polymer or composite frame. The slide features a series of diagonal serrations near the rear for improved grip during operation, and the barrel is short, consistent with a concealed carry or backup pistol. The grip panels are dark brown with a subtle camouflage pattern and a single visible screw, suggesting a removable or customizable design. The trigger guard is rounded and generously sized, providing ample space for finger placement and possibly gloved use. The magazine base is flush with the bottom of the grip, maintaining a streamlined profile. No visible manufacturer markings or serial numbers are present on the slide, giving the handgun a utilitarian and unbranded appearance.
description: A compact, matte gray semi-automatic handgun with a dark brown camo-patterned grip and a streamlined, unmarked slide. The design is modern and utilitarian, with a flush magazine base and prominent slide serrations.
description_view_0: The handgun is viewed directly from the muzzle, showing the circular barrel opening and the squared-off slide profile.
description_view_1: The left side reveals the slide serrations, camo-patterned grip panel, and the rounded trigger guard, with the magazine base flush to the grip.
description_view_2: A rear view highlights the width of the slide and grip, with the backstrap and magazine base visible.
description_view_3: The right side mirrors the left, showing the slide serrations, grip panel, and the overall compact profile.
attribute_grip_design: The grip features a dark brown panel with a subtle camouflage pattern, secured by a single screw. Its contour is gently curved for ergonomic comfort, with a smooth surface and no visible checkering or stippling. The grip appears to be made of a composite or polymer material, providing a balance of durability and comfort. There are no visible logos, finger grooves, or decorative embellishments, giving it a minimalist and utilitarian appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. Its curvature is smooth and continuous, with no undercuts or squared-off edges. The guard is integrated seamlessly into the frame, lacking any visible texturing or reinforcement, and does not feature accessory rails or unique design elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and standard in profile, with a circular muzzle opening and no visible threading, porting, or compensator. The exterior finish matches the matte gray of the slide, and there are no visible markings or fluting on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, caliber designations, or decorative patterns on the slide. The only notable feature is a set of diagonal serrations near the rear of the slide, which are functional rather than decorative.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, maintaining a streamlined and compact profile. There are no finger rests, flares, or visible logos or texturing on the base, emphasizing a minimalist and practical design.
